title: Detect and fail stale procedures after one hour

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementing a direct CLI stale-procedure timeout path with a 1-hour inactivity threshold. Plan: add a  command that scans running procedures/tasks for last activity, marks stale ones as FAILED/TIMED_OUT with a structured timeout error in existing metadata/error fields, and invoke the same scan asynchronously when a new direct procedure run starts so stale records are cleaned up without blocking the active run.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Updating stale-timeout behavior per latest requirement: scope detection/reporting to procedures started in the last 72 hours, list that full set in command output, and continue marking stalled RUNNING procedures as FAILED when chat inactivity exceeds threshold.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Patched ProcedureTask error-state rendering: segmented bar now forces FAILED when procedure.status is ERROR/FAILED even if task.status is stale COMPLETED; also prevented completion segment from turning green when overall task status is FAILED. Verified with dashboard TypeScript compile.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting change: stale-timeout classification will use STALLED status (procedure/task/stages) instead of FAILED/error semantics, with corresponding ProcedureTask/TaskStatus UI mapping updates so stalled appears distinct from errors.
